name: Ship.Tires
description: Shop & Ship Car, Truck & SUV Tires — Free Delivery. 434+ brands, 800+ models, 307,000+ tires delivered free to 1,000+ US cities. Search tires by size, vehicle, brand, or location. Create checkout carts and complete purchases.

skills.name: Search Tires
skills.description: Search car, truck & SUV tires by size, brand, category, or price range. Returns matching tires with pricing and free delivery info.

skills.name: Vehicle Tire Lookup
skills.description: Find the right tire size for any car, truck, or SUV by year, make, and model. Returns compatible tire sizes and recommendations.
examples: What tires fit a 2024 Toyota Camry?
Find tires for my 2023 Ford F-150
What size tires does a 2024 Honda CR-V need?

skills.name: Browse Tire Brands
skills.description: List all 434+ tire brands with models, pricing, and available sizes. Brands include Michelin, Goodyear, Bridgestone, Continental, Pirelli, Hankook, Cooper, Firestone, BFGoodrich, Yokohama, and 424 more.

skills.name: Find Delivery Location
skills.description: Search 1,000+ US cities for free tire delivery. Ship tires to your door or local installer in any of the 50 states.
examples: Find tire delivery in Los Angeles

skills.name: Create Checkout Cart
skills.description: Create a pre-built shopping cart with selected tires and generate a secure checkout link. Customer clicks the link to complete purchase with free delivery.
examples: Order 4 Michelin Defender LTX M/S 2 in 225/65R17

skills.name: Get Page Content
skills.description: Retrieve any Ship.Tires page as AI-readable markdown. Covers tire brands, models, locations, blog posts, racing content, and more.

skills.name: Submit Quote Request
skills.description: Submit a customer inquiry or free quote request for car, truck, or SUV tires. Includes name, email, phone, and tire details.
